Your Commitment Contract

Before you begin, you need to make a promise. Not to me — to yourself.

I, ____, understand that:

1. My attention is the most valuable asset I own. Every hour lost to scrolling is an hour that never returns.

2. This challenge will be hard. My brain will resist. That is normal — it is neural withdrawal.

3. Every day I complete is a day that changes my brain at a biological level, permanently.

4. I will reach Day 8 — where the revelation will redefine my relationship with time forever.

I sign this contract knowing the version of me that will exist on Day 8 is worth every second of effort.
By signing, you commit to the full 8 days. Your brain will thank you.
